name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for DND Flow
labels: enhancement

## Summary
Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Problem it solves
What limitation or friction are you trying to fix?

## Proposed solution
Describe your idea as clearly as possible.

## Alternatives considered
List any alternatives or workarounds you thought about.

## Extra context
Add screenshots, examples, or notes here if helpful.
